headline: Agent orchestration and code verification dominate the window as a cluster of browser sandboxing techniques breaks out.
body: The leading rotation centers on coding-agent reliability: Google Cloud Tech and IBM frame human-in-the-loop review and debugging as guardrails against agent-generated technical debt, while Omnigent positions itself as a meta-harness routing tasks across Claude Code, Codex, and Pi. A fresh cluster of sandboxing techniques (sandbox attribute, Content Security Policy, iframe, srcdoc, storage isolation, origin isolation) enters as new entrants, tied to a talk on why MCP and ChatGPT apps nest double iframes for security boundaries. Ensemble methods and frontier models break out alongside OpenRouter's Fusion API, which routes prompts to multiple models and synthesizes via a judge, though tested results were inconsistent and sometimes slower than single strong models. Commodity pressure surfaces in discussion of OpenAI price cuts and Anthropic's flubbed Fable rollout.
